caption: The image depicts a group of individuals engaged in the traditional Korean communal activity of Kimjang, where they are wearing protective clothing such as hairnets and masks while handling salted napa cabbage and red chili paste on large tables.

The image depicts a person wearing black gloves and an apron, actively mixing and handling vibrant orange-red kimchi with their hands over a large glass bowl filled with the same mixture, showcasing the communal and hands-on nature of Kimjang.

A group of individuals dressed in traditional white hanbok are waving the Taegeukgi, the national flag of Korea, in what appears to be a celebratory event marking the 104th anniversary of the independence movement.
The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional Korean attire, including white hanbok, with some holding or waving the Taegeukgi, symbolizing the Korean independence movement.
The image depicts a person adorned in a vibrant red hanbok with intricate floral patterns, standing in a traditional setting that suggests a cultural or historical context.

The image depicts a traditional Korean wedding ceremony (Jeontonghonrye) where a couple is dressed in vibrant hanboks, seated before a ritual table adorned with various ceremonial items, including wooden mandarin ducks and candles.

The image depicts a traditional Korean ancestral rite (Jesa) setup with a wooden table adorned with various food offerings such as fruits, pastries, and rice cakes, surrounded by calligraphy panels and a tea set, all set on a woven mat.
The image depicts an "Ancestral rite" (Jesa) where family members gather around a ritual table adorned with various food offerings, performing deep bows as part of the traditional ceremony.

The image depicts a group of people standing in a line on a paved area, facing a statue that appears to be part of a memorial or historical site, rather than a traditional Korean grave-tending rite known as Seongmyo.

The image depicts a solemn gathering at Seongmyo, where a group of men in formal attire stand respectfully beside a grass-covered burial mound adorned with white flowers and a South Korean flag, symbolizing respect and remembrance.
The Cheomseongdae observatory is depicted as a cylindrical stack of stones with a square top frame, illuminated against a dark night sky, standing solitary in an open field.
The Cheomseongdae observatory is a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, standing prominently in an open field under a clear sky.
The Gyeongbokgung palace is illuminated at night, showcasing its traditional wooden pavilions with upturned eaves, vibrant dancheong paintwork, and elevated stone platforms against a deep blue sky.

The Gyeongbokgung palace is a traditional Korean structure featuring wooden pavilions with upturned eaves, vibrant dancheong paintwork, and elevated stone platforms, set against a backdrop of lush green hills under a clear blue sky.
The image depicts Cheonggyecheon, an urban stream in Seoul, characterized by its shallow waterway flowing through stone embankments, surrounded by lush greenery and pedestrian walkways alongside.
The statue of Admiral Yi Sun-shin is depicted in Joseon military armor, holding a sword, standing on a pedestal in an urban plaza.

The image features two individuals performing a traditional Korean Jeol and Sebae, characterized by their deep bows and kneeling posture, with hands placed flat on the floor, dressed in formal attire.
The image features two children performing Jeol and Sebae, a traditional Korean bowing gesture, while dressed in colorful hanboks.

The image depicts a family scene where two children, dressed in traditional Korean hanbok, are engaged in a Jeol and Sebae ritual, kneeling and bowing deeply with their hands on the floor, demonstrating respect and cultural tradition.

The statue of King Sejong the Great is depicted as a seated figure adorned in traditional Joseon robes, wearing a distinctive winged crown, and is positioned on a pedestal with Korean text inscribed on it.
The statue depicts King Sejong the Great seated on a throne, adorned in traditional Joseon robes and wearing an ikseongwan, with Korean text inscribed at its base.
The image features a vibrant, multicolored kite soaring high in the sky, showcasing its rectangular shape and colorful geometric patterns typical of Yeon-nalligi.
The image features a person flying a colorful kite with a distinctive rectangular shape and a central hole, characteristic of Yeon-nalligi, against a backdrop of a clear sky and lush greenery.
The image depicts a vibrant 'Yutnori' game board adorned with colorful floral patterns, surrounded by players seated on the floor, actively engaged in the traditional Korean board game.
The image features a traditional Korean Yutnori game setup with four wooden sticks (yut) mid-air above two children dressed in colorful hanbok, indicating an engaging and culturally rich activity.
A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing the Ganggangsullae, a circular dance, on a wooden platform with a bridge and flags in the background.
A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing the Ganggangsullae dance in a large circle formation on a stage under a full moon.

The image depicts a performer dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a yellow top with a purple sash and a long blue skirt, with an exaggerated painted mask covering their face, embodying the essence of Talchum, a Korean masked dance-drama.

The image showcases an array of colorful and intricately designed wooden masks, each with unique facial expressions and patterns, reminiscent of the traditional Korean masked dance-drama known as Talchum.

The image showcases a bowl of Ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red spicy broth, garnished with green herbs and white toppings, accompanied by wooden chopsticks resting on the rim of the bowl.
The image features a pot of Ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red spicy broth, garnished with green onions and corn kernels, placed on a white surface next to a container of kimchi.

The image displays a box filled with neatly arranged gimbap rolls, each featuring vibrant fillings such as cucumber slices, shredded carrots, and pieces of shrimp, all encased in a dark green seaweed wrap and topped with sesame seeds.
The image displays a plate filled with numerous small, round, golden-brown patties known as Panfried battered meatballs, which have an egg-batter coating and are garnished with green herbs.
The image showcases an assortment of Hangwa, featuring small decorative pieces in pastel colors such as yellow, pink, and white, with pressed floral or geometric patterns, arranged neatly on a tray.
The image displays a box filled with an assortment of colorful Hangwa, featuring small decorative pieces in pastel hues and pressed floral or geometric patterns.
The Yaksik is presented in a white bowl on a checkered cloth, showcasing a rich, dark-brown glossy mound of sticky glutinous rice mixed with chestnuts, jujubes, and pine nuts.
The image displays a plate of Yakgwa, featuring small, flower-shaped and round pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze, garnished with white flowers and green leaves.

The image showcases a large, round pan filled with Bulgogi, featuring thinly sliced pieces of marinated beef with a glossy dark-brown glaze, accompanied by green onions and other vegetables, all sizzling over a heat source.

The image showcases a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with green onions, red chili pepper, and a sprinkle of seaweed.

The image displays a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with a sprig of seaweed and a slice of green onion.

The image showcases a vibrant and appetizing Japchae dish, featuring translucent brown glass noodles mixed with colorful julienned vegetables such as carrots, green onions, and leafy greens, all coated in a glossy sesame oil sheen.

The Namhansanseong fortress is characterized by its traditional Korean architecture, featuring a multi-tiered roof adorned with colorful decorations, supported by red pillars, and surrounded by a robust stone wall that blends harmoniously with the natural landscape.

The Haenggung is depicted as a serene complex of traditional Korean architecture, featuring wooden buildings with curved tile roofs and dancheong-painted eaves, nestled amidst lush greenery under a clear blue sky.

The Paldalmun Gate is a striking example of traditional Korean architecture, featuring an arched stone gateway topped with a wooden pavilion and flanked by curved fortress walls adorned with red flags.
The EXPO Hanbit Tower stands prominently against the backdrop of a cloudy sky, its distinctive white structure with a disc-shaped deck and pointed spire reaching towards the heavens.
The image captures a moment from The Korean War, showcasing soldiers in military attire engaging in conversation near their vehicles and equipment, set against a backdrop of lush green hills.

The image depicts a desolate and war-torn landscape, likely representing the aftermath of the Korean War, characterized by dilapidated buildings, overgrown vegetation, and a general sense of abandonment.
The image does not contain any visible statues, monuments, memorial walls, or wartime photographs that would directly represent "The Korean War."
The small paper-and-coin shuttlecock (jegi) is seen flying through the air after being kicked by the man in the blue shirt during their outdoor activity.
The image features a small paper-and-coin shuttlecock (jegi) kicked into the air with the foot, symbolizing the traditional Korean shuttlecock-kicking game known as Jegichagi.
